name: Falafel (Veg Times)
recipeIngredient: 2 slices French bread, torn & soaked in cold water to cover
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Blend garlic, onion, and parsley in a food processor until finely minced.
3. Add chick peas and blend until finely chopped.
4. Add lemon juice, herbs, spices, and squeezed-out bread to the mixture. Process until well combined.
5. Form the mixture into 16 balls.
6. Flatten each ball to form 1/2-inch patties and dredge in flour.
7. Place the patties on a lightly greased baking sheet.
8. Bake for 10 minutes, then turn and bake for another 10 minutes.
9. In a heavy skillet, heat half the oil over medium-high heat.
10. Add patties and fry until golden brown and crispy on the bottom. Turn patties and add the rest of the oil; fry until golden and crispy.
11. Drain on paper towels and serve with pita bread garnished with lettuce, tomatoes, cucumbers, onions, and hot sauce.
